findings.message: Import-graph resolver could not follow 816 import specifier(s) (bare specs, workspace mappings the resolver could not read, or unsupported syntax). Reachability is conservative.

Source file aider/commands.py was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

pr.title: Allow adding files outside repo when git commits off.
pr.body: For people who don't allow aider to make commits it is useful to be able to modify files outside the repo.
pr.author: chr15m
